description_long: This handbag features a rectangular, slightly tapered body with a woven straw-like texture on the main exterior surface, giving it a natural, artisanal appearance. The lower portion and the top edge are reinforced with a dark brown material, likely faux leather or leather, providing both structure and contrast. A slim, dark wrist strap is attached to one end, allowing for easy carrying or hanging. The top of the bag is secured with a zipper closure that runs the full length of the opening. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible logos or decorative embellishments, emphasizing the interplay of natural and dark tones. The bag appears lightweight and compact, suitable for carrying small personal items in an urban setting.
description: A compact, rectangular handbag with a woven straw-like body, dark brown leather accents, and a slim wrist strap. The design is minimalist and natural, featuring a full-length zipper closure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the woven straw-like main body, dark brown base and top edge, and the attached wrist strap on the left.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the slim profile of the handbag, with the layered materials visible and the zipper at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the woven texture and dark brown accents, and the wrist strap now on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the wrist strap hanging down.
attribute_strap_type: Single slim wrist strap, non-adjustable, attached to one end of the zipper.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Zipper closure running the full length of the top opening.
attribute_pattern: Woven straw-like texture on the main body; no printed or graphic pattern.
